sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112897" key="fwtokra/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φωτο-κράτωρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">α], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n112897.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lord of light,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">595</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
